expectations.text: Defines review scope using all uncommitted changed files rather than only phase-touched files
expectations.evidence: Response says `Review scope is built from all uncommitted changed files` and lists `src/api/routes.ts`, `src/core/service.ts`, and `docs/notes.md` from the changed-file set.
Response explicitly says `excluding `.gitignore` from review` and lists `Excluded Files: `.gitignore``.

expectations.text: Includes a Review Scope Coverage block with Total Changed (Uncommitted) Files, Total Reviewed Files, Missing Files, and Missing File List
expectations.evidence: Response includes a `Review Scope Coverage` block with `Total Changed (Uncommitted) Files`, `Total Reviewed Files`, `Missing Files`, and `Missing File List`.

expectations.text: Includes Excluded Files and Completion Gate lines in the Review Scope Coverage template
expectations.evidence: The same block includes `Excluded Files: `.gitignore`` and `Completion Gate: Missing Files > 0 => INCOMPLETE (requires explicit deferment/approval)`.

expectations.text: States that Missing Files > 0 means code review is incomplete unless explicitly deferred/approved
expectations.evidence: The completion gate explicitly states that `Missing Files > 0 => INCOMPLETE` unless deferred or approved.

claims.claim: Code review scope must be derived from all uncommitted changes, not just phase-touched files.
claims.evidence: The response explicitly defines scope from all uncommitted changed files and then materializes the full list.
